articles.title: Celtics reportedly targeting Evan Mobley after falling short in Giannis trade
articles.description:
"They are hunting a big man,' says a rival executive. 'And they are willing to trade [Brown] to get it.'"

The post Celtics reportedly targeting Evan Mobley after falling short in Giannis trade appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Celtics are pursuing Evan Mobley to strengthen their roster after failing to acquire Giannis.
Rival executives suggest Boston may trade Jaylen Brown for Mobley to secure a big man.
This potential trade could significantly reshape the Celtics' lineup and playoff aspirations.

articles.title: Struggling Red Sox blow another lead to Rockies, lose 8-6
articles.description:
Boston hasn't won back-to-back series since April 6-12.

The post Struggling Red Sox blow another lead to Rockies, lose 8-6 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox lost 8-6 to Rockies, marking another disappointing game.
Boston hasn't won back-to-back series since April 6-12, 2023.
Fans express frustration as team struggles to maintain competitive performance.

articles.title: Travis Kelce lookalike allegedly stole purse, credit cards, New Hampshire police say
articles.description:
“Are we sure this isn’t Travis, actually? Anyone know where he’s been? Have times been tough? I mean I know the Chiefs missed the playoffs….”

The post Travis Kelce lookalike allegedly stole purse, credit cards, New Hampshire police say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: New Hampshire police report a Travis Kelce lookalike stole a purse and credit cards.
The incident raises concerns about local crime, affecting Boston residents' safety.
Authorities urge vigilance as similar thefts may impact nearby communities.

articles.title: Plane lands at Logan after captain experiences ‘medical emergency,’ authorities say
articles.description:
A co-pilot took over the flight and landed safely.

The post Plane lands at Logan after captain experiences ‘medical emergency,’ authorities say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Co-pilot safely landed the plane at Logan Airport after captain's medical emergency.
Incident occurred on June 24, affecting passengers on the flight.
Local authorities ensured no injuries, maintaining safety for Boston travelers.

articles.title: 5 Bruins takeaways from Don Sweeney’s pre-draft press conference
articles.description:
"Sometimes that's a half a step back for two steps forward."

The post 5 Bruins takeaways from Don Sweeney’s pre-draft press conference appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Don Sweeney emphasizes strategic moves for Bruins' future during pre-draft press conference.
Sweeney discusses potential trades and free agency plans ahead of the NHL Draft on June 28.
Local fans may see roster changes aimed at improving team performance next season.
